items.title: Five frontier LLMs disagree on 67% of 1k real-world fact-check claims
Oura unveils its Ring 5 with a thinner, lighter design starting at $399
items.summary: The ring is 40% smaller than its predecessor, and comes with more accurate sensing, enhanced battery life, and more.

items.title: They’ve finally made the Oura Ring smaller and lighter
items.summary: Wherever I go, whatever I do, people point at my finger and ask, "Is that an Oura Ring?" Lots of people find they like the design, and they tell me why they're thinking about switching to a smart ring…

items.title: Kia’s flagship EV has a battery problem
items.summary: I first realized there was an issue with Kia's flagship EV9 when I tried to unlock my car last year. The hulking three-row SUV was sitting on my driveway completely dead. The key didn't work, the app…
